textByHash.2346790d7bfe8866e0d81bc1e08bee13b6da3c9b: They're primarily for the workmen bringing finds from the Dig Site, but you can go through if you want.
textByHash.357438120dcad0985c23f9232e09cd45445a1f0b: They're for the workmen bringing finds from the Dig Site; sorry, but you can't go through.
textByHash.395b25c95624ae2d6e6eee8d4e295126b0abb6c5: Hello there. Come to see the new museum?
textByHash.3f1444608d4a3300342b75670773c5c0488fda57: You're not permitted in this area.
textByHash.686386f84b80c03306b617cb036b848118415855: Well, the main entrance is 'round the front. Just head west then north slightly, you can't miss it!
textByHash.bb4050db42a112f051588062400e2f604caa46c2: Hello there! Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I'm guarding this workman's gate. I'm afraid you can't come through here - you'll need to find another way around.
textByHash.d278be34850aa200ae3bc8cf8caae789a5604aca: Hello there! Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I'm guarding this workman's gate. As a friend of the museum, you may pass through as you wish.
